definitions: Headphones that connect to an audio source via a physical cable or cord, as opposed to wireless headphones.
An audio output device worn on or around the head, featuring speakers for listening to sound, and physically connected to a device.
examples: Many audiophiles prefer corded headphones for their superior sound quality.
She still uses corded headphones with her old MP3 player.
Corded headphones are often more affordable than their wireless counterparts.
